summary: Tested Student Photo Upload feature (backend + frontend). All 9 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified with screenshots - all elements present and working.
seed_data_creation: Updated admin@test.local password_hash for testing. Test photos exist at /app/uploads/student_photos/ for stu_2eb15b7d, stu_ac501dd5, stu_15965c26.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Photo upload feature fully tested and working. Backend: POST /api/students/upload-photos correctly matches students, skips staff folders, handles trailing spaces, saves files to disk, updates DB photo_url, returns correct counts. Static serving at /api/student-photos/{filename} works. Frontend: Settings->Imports tab has Student Photos card with Choose ZIP button (data-testid=photo-zip-input). Students list and Student Profile page correctly display photo avatars from photo_url. All 9 backend API tests pass.
features_verified: POST /api/students/upload-photos exists and requires admin/leadership role
ZIP upload with valid student names returns correct matched/unmatched/skipped_staff counts
Unmatched filenames returned in unmatched_names array
Trailing spaces in filenames handled correctly
Student DB record updated with photo_url field
Static file serving works: GET /api/student-photos/{filename} returns 200 image
Settings page Imports tab has Student Photos card with data-testid='photo-zip-input'
Students list page shows photo avatars for students with photo_url
Student Profile page shows photo in header
